skills.name: csv-rolling-average
skills.description: Drop a CSV file and compute a 7-row rolling average of a revenue column locally with DuckDB.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Uses DuckDB to compute a 7-row rolling average for a `revenue` column from a dropped CSV via read_csv_auto('$DROPPED_FILE'). Returns {result_json} with revenue and rolling_avg_7 rows in input order. Local-only, no network.

skills.name: csv-sum-column
skills.description: Drop a CSV file and compute SUM(revenue) locally with DuckDB.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Uses DuckDB to compute SUM(revenue) from a dropped CSV via read_csv_auto('$DROPPED_FILE'). Returns {result_json}. Local-only, no network. Use for quick revenue totals before optional LLM interpretation or notifications.

skills.name: markdown-to-pdf
skills.description: Drop a Markdown file to convert it into a PDF using Pandoc (local-only).
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Converts a local Markdown file (.md) to PDF using Pandoc and writes <input>.pdf beside the source file. Returns {saved_path}. Local-only, no network. Useful as the document-render step after an LLM rewrite skill that outputs Markdown.

skills.name: pdf-to-text
skills.description: Drop a PDF file to extract its plain text via Pandoc. Local-only, no network.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Extracts plain text from a PDF using Pandoc (--to plain). Returns {text}. Local-only — no LLM, no network. Requires pandoc sidecar. Chain text output into an LLM step for analysis or summarization.

skills.name: ocr-to-text
skills.description: Drop an image file to extract text locally with Tesseract and save a .txt output.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Runs Tesseract OCR on a local image (png/jpg/jpeg/tiff/bmp/gif/webp) and saves the extracted text as a .txt file in ~/Documents/ocr/. Returns {saved_path}. Local-only, no network.

skills.name: compress-video-720p
skills.description: Drop a video file to generate a smaller MP4 share copy using ffmpeg.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Creates a share-friendly MP4 copy from a local video file using ffmpeg and writes <input>-720p.mp4 beside the source file. Returns {saved_path}. Local-only, no network. Use when compatibility and easier sharing matter more than preserving original encoding.

skills.name: extract-audio
skills.description: Drop a video file to convert it into an .m4a audio file using ffmpeg.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Converts a local video file (mp4/mov/mkv/webm) to an .m4a file using ffmpeg and writes <input>.m4a beside the source file. Returns {saved_path}. Local-only, no network. Commonly used before official/media/transcribe-audio.

skills.name: transcribe-audio
skills.description: Drop an audio file to transcribe it locally via Whisper. Returns a plain-text transcript.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Transcribes a local audio file (mp3/m4a/wav/flac) using Whisper — fully local, no network. Returns {transcript}. Whisper runs the audio and returns text to stdout. Pairs with official/media/youtube-dl: download audio, then drop the saved file to transcribe. Requires whisper sidecar installed.

skills.name: video-to-gif
skills.description: Drop a video file to convert it into a GIF for easy sharing.
skills.llm_hint: Fires on file drop. Converts a local video file (mp4/mov/mkv/webm) to a GIF using ffmpeg and writes <input>.gif beside the source file. Returns {saved_path}. Local-only, no network. Use for simple clip sharing when animation format is preferred.

skills.name: youtube-dl
skills.description: Downloads audio from a YouTube URL copied to the clipboard into ~/Downloads/.
skills.llm_hint: Fires when a YouTube URL is copied. Downloads audio to ~/Downloads/ via yt-dlp. Returns {saved_path} — the download directory (~/Downloads/); the exact filename is not surfaced without registry flags not in the contract. Compose with official/media/transcribe-audio by dropping the saved file onto the ClawWidget drop zone to produce a transcript. Single-video only — not for playlists. Requires yt-dlp sidecar.

skills.name: clipboard-action-items
skills.description: Extracts actionable next steps from copied text, then notifies via official/utilities/notify.
skills.llm_hint: Fires when text is copied. Uses an LLM to extract concrete action items / next steps from clipboard text as a plain-text '-' bullet list, shows them in a notification, then calls official/utilities/notify (JIT via requires). Returns {action_items}. Requires LLM API key; network is llm-only. Covers meeting notes and email-style captures (sp_b1_action_item_extractor).

skills.name: clipboard-proofread
skills.description: Proofreads copied text for grammar and clarity, then notifies via official/utilities/notify.
skills.llm_hint: Fires when text is copied. Proofreads clipboard text for grammar, spelling, and punctuation via LLM (meaning preserved), shows the result in a notification, then calls official/utilities/notify (JIT via requires). Returns {corrected_text}. Requires LLM API key; network is llm-only. Same chain shape as official/productivity/clipboard-summary.

skills.name: clipboard-summary
skills.description: Summarizes clipboard text into 2-3 bullet points and notifies via official/utilities/notify.
skills.llm_hint: Fires when text is copied. Summarizes clipboard content to 2-3 bullets via LLM, then fires official/utilities/notify (auto-installed via requires). Returns {summary}. Requires LLM API key in Keychain. First real requires-chain in the catalog — install this skill and official/utilities/notify is fetched automatically from the registry.

skills.name: clipboard-translate-to-english
skills.description: Translates copied text into clear English, then notifies via official/utilities/notify.
skills.llm_hint: Fires when text is copied. Translates clipboard text to clear, natural English via LLM (if already English, light polish only), shows the result in a notification, then calls official/utilities/notify (JIT via requires). Returns {english_text}. Requires LLM API key; network is llm-only. Same chain shape as official/productivity/clipboard-summary and clipboard-proofread.

skills.name: notify
skills.description: Fires a "Done." desktop notification. Composable completion primitive for skill chains.
skills.llm_hint: Composable completion primitive. Invoke via `cwidget skill call official/utilities/notify` (no input required). Returns {sent: true}. No permissions, no sidecars, no network. Use as the terminal step of any chain to signal completion to the user. Pairs with official/productivity/clipboard-summary as its JIT-resolved dependency.
